title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.360 - Endorsement of surrendered bonds
text:
33.360.  Endorsement of surrendered bonds. — The state treasurer shall endorse the bond or bonds or coupons surrendered with the words:
(RSMo 1939 § 13073, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 90, A.L. 1977 H.B. 178) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11456; 1919 § 13362; 1909 § 11863
